title: C-Level Board Memo Builder
description: Create an executive memo, urgency score, risk profile, decision matrix, owner map, and 30/60/90-day plan.

fields.name: currentProblem
fields.label: Current problem
fields.placeholder: Pipeline slowing while burn remains high

fields.name: goal
fields.label: Leadership goal
fields.placeholder: Extend runway and return to efficient growth

fields.name: constraints
fields.label: Constraints
fields.placeholder: No major hiring, board wants a plan in two weeks

scoringRules.label: Urgency
scoringRules.description: Runway and severity of current problem.

sampleInput.currentProblem: Pipeline is slowing while burn remains high and sales cycle length is increasing.
sampleInput.goal: Extend runway and return to efficient growth within two quarters.
sampleInput.constraints: No major hiring, board wants a decision plan in two weeks, product team is mid-release.
